findings.title: storage-cleanup has zero in-route auth and accepts arbitrary storagePath
findings.impact: Any unauthenticated POST with {storagePath:'<path>'} deletes the GCS object. Cloud Run does NOT auto-validate OIDC because the Next.js service is publicly reachable.
findings.fix: Add CRON_SECRET bearer check + verify Pub/Sub OIDC ID token + validate storagePath prefix against allowlist (lessons/, images/, voice-messages/, exports/)

findings.title: ai-reactive-reply is open if AI_INTERNAL_SECRET env is unset
findings.impact: Attacker spams community_chat with AI persona messages and consumes Gemini quota. ~30% post rate per call.
findings.fix: Hard-require the secret; return 503 if unset (match other jobs)

findings.title: edu-news forwarder replays all caller headers to daily-briefing
findings.impact: Auth-rate-limit laundering; potential host-header confusion. Deprecated route should be deleted.

findings.title: export-reminder anonymize is non-idempotent and bypassable in non-prod
findings.impact: Re-runs rewrite displayName='Former Teacher' on already-anonymised users every tick. In non-prod with CRON_SECRET unset, anyone can trigger mass anonymisation.
findings.fix: Add .where('cancellation.anonymized','==',false); require CRON_SECRET unconditionally; return 503 not 500

findings.title: community_chat schema split breaks AI cooldown between cron + reactive jobs
findings.impact: Cron-agent posts are invisible to reactive-reply's cooldown query → AI can post twice within 1 minute.

findings.title: community-chat-cleanup caps at 500 docs/day with no continuation
findings.impact: If backlog accrues, cleanup never catches up
findings.fix: Loop until snapshot.empty within maxDuration budget

findings.title: ai-community-agent has no global rate limit / cooldown
findings.impact: Misconfigured scheduler or manual curl bursts post 2-4 AI messages per call with no per-hour cap
findings.fix: Read most-recent AI post timestamp; refuse if < 30 min ago

findings.title: grow-persona-pool has no absolute pool size cap
findings.impact: Per-run cap (15) is enforced, but daily cron grows pool unboundedly
findings.fix: Read current pool size; refuse if >= TARGET_POOL_SIZE (~300)

findings.title: billing-reconciliation auto-fixes new plan_ids to 'gold' by default
findings.impact: If PLAN_NAME_MAP not updated when a new Razorpay plan ships, every user on that plan is force-set to 'gold' every 4h. Also D2 downgrade resets monthlyCredits + creditsUsed.
findings.fix: If plan_id not in PLAN_NAME_MAP → flag instead of auto-fix; add mutex to prevent parallel runs

findings.title: export-reminder reminder-count guard uses <= (latent off-by-one)
findings.impact: Benign at REMINDER_DAYS=[1,7,21,28] but fragile under schedule edits

findings.title: daily-briefing URL dedup window is only 200 SYSTEM posts (~40 days)
findings.impact: Evergreen news can re-post after 40 days
findings.fix: Dedicated posted_news_urls collection with longer TTL
